title: [SBW] Advanced CIWS
description: Adds smart drone defense to the Superb Warfare H/PJ-11 CIWS.
body:
**[SBW] Advanced CIWS** upgrades the Superb Warfare H/PJ-11 CIWS into a smarter anti-drone defense system. 🚀
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
This addon lets the CIWS automatically detect, track, and shoot down hostile or untrusted Superb Warfare drones. The turret aims toward detected drones, follows them while targeting, and fires automatically when they are not whitelisted. 🎯
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
**Features:**

🛡️ Automatic anti-drone defense for the H/PJ-11 CIWS

🎯 Smooth turret tracking toward drone targets

💥 Automatic firing and drone damage

👤 Player gamertag whitelist system

🔧 CIWS Wrench item for managing whitelist entries

🖥️ Clean whitelist GUI

✨ Lock-on particles and targeting effects

⚙️ Configurable range, cooldown, damage, ammo usage, and effects

💾 Per-CIWS whitelist storage saved with the world

📜 Commands for debug, whitelist clearing, and whitelist listing
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**Whitelist system:**
Use the CIWS Wrench while sneaking on an H/PJ-11 CIWS to open the whitelist GUI. Add trusted player gamertags there. Drones controlled or owned by whitelisted players will be ignored, while untrusted drones will be targeted automatically. ✅
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

This mod is an addon for Superb Warfare and does not copy any Superb Warfare assets, textures, models, or sounds.

![intelji](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

Disclaimer about product: NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT
